summary: The diff implements responsive design changes across most required components. Navigation (REQ-1), HeroSection (REQ-2), ServicesSection/ServiceCard (REQ-3), ProductCatalogSection/ProductCard/InquiryBasket (REQ-4), GallerySection/ImageLightbox (REQ-5), PricingSection/PricingCard (REQ-6), ContractorZoneSection/ContractorInquiryForm/PremiumQuoteBuilder/ContactSection (REQ-7), Footer (REQ-8), FloatingWhatsAppButton (REQ-10) are all present and modified with responsive Tailwind classes. AdminPanel (REQ-9) is present but truncated. SiteVisitBookingForm (REQ-7) is not explicitly visible in the diff. Overall coverage appears high but some components are truncated, making full verification difficult.

missing_requirements.requirement: Make the SiteVisitBookingForm responsive: full-width inputs on mobile, proper label spacing, and submit buttons that are easy to tap.
missing_requirements.reason: SiteVisitBookingForm is listed as a required component in REQ-7 but no diff entry for frontend/src/components/SiteVisitBookingForm.tsx appears in the modified files list.

missing_requirements.requirement: Product list switches to card layout on mobile if the table overflows.
missing_requirements.reason: AdminPanel.tsx is truncated in the diff. The product management table/card-layout switching for mobile cannot be confirmed from the available content.
